summary: Guardian Live Map & Incident Replay features tested. Backend 93% (13/14), Frontend 100%. Both major features working correctly.

issues: User card not visible in initial view (might need scroll or panel adjustment)

Backend_Guardian_Live_API.GET /api/guardian/live/protected-users (: PASS - Returns protected_users array with user_id, name, email, relationship, has_active_session, risk_level, risk_score, is_self fields
Backend_Guardian_Live_API.GET /api/guardian/live/status/{user_id}: PASS - Returns comprehensive status with session, risk, behavior_pattern, recommendation, recent_alerts, past_sessions

Backend_Guardian_Incidents_API.GET /api/guardian/incidents (success): PASS - Returns incidents array sorted by date
Backend_Guardian_Incidents_API.GET /api/guardian/incidents/{id}/replay: PASS - Returns full replay with timeline, ai_analysis (root_cause, risk_score_at_incident, response_time_seconds, preventable, contributing_factors, recommendation)

Frontend_Guardian_Live_Map.Page load: PASS - /m/guardian-live-map loads with dark Leaflet map
Frontend_Guardian_Live_Map.Intelligence panel: PASS - Shows AI Risk score, Pattern, Action
Frontend_Guardian_Live_Map.Action buttons: PASS - Call, Message, Safety Ping, Alert buttons present with data-testids

Frontend_Incident_Replay.Date grouping: PASS - Incidents grouped by date (Yesterday, Today)
Frontend_Incident_Replay.ReplayView: PASS - Clicking incident opens replay view
Frontend_Incident_Replay.Timeline: PASS - Event timeline with session start, alerts, session end
Frontend_Incident_Replay.AI Analysis: PASS - Root cause, Risk score (1.1), Response time (9s), Preventable (YES), Contributing factors, Recommendation shown

Frontend_Navigation.Alerts → Incidents: PASS - incident-replay-btn present on Alerts page

action_items: MINOR: Add UUID validation in /api/guardian/live/status endpoint to return 422/400 instead of 500 for invalid UUIDs
critical_code_review_comments: Guardian Live API correctly handles self-monitoring mode (user can see their own status)
AI Analysis in incident replay provides root cause, risk score at incident, response time, preventable flag, and contributing factors
Leaflet map uses CartoDB dark tiles as specified
All action buttons (Call, Message, Safety Ping, Alert) have proper data-testids
Push notification APIs still working (regression verified)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guardian Live Map and Incident Replay features fully tested. Protected users API returns user with is_self=true for self-monitoring. Live status returns session data, risk info, behavior pattern, recommendation. Incidents API returns list of alerts sorted by date. Replay endpoint returns timeline and AI analysis. Push notification status APIs verified working (regression). Only minor issue: invalid UUID in status endpoint returns 500.
